sessions: Run the test suite and report how many tests pass. Do not change any code.
Find where first() decides an iterable was empty, and add a short comment above that code explaining the rule in your own words.
Add a test that asserts first() raises ValueError on an empty iterable when no default is given. Put it in a new file tests/test_first_probe.py.
Run the full suite again. If anything you added fails, fix your own test.
